title: BlockPreventer
body:
![Big Logo of the resource](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/930dbf8f986ed96d516141e3bc8f135b0a616fa9.png)
BlockPreventer is an advanced and open source plugin, that disables breaking blocks for all players. You can configure what gamemode you don’t want players to break blocks.

Requirements:
- a Spigot/Paper Server
- Java 8+

Config:

```
# BlockPreventer Configuration (by Donut4GAMER)
# thanks for downloading this plugin

# set the gamemode, where the blockprventer works
# use: SURVIVAL, ADVENTURE, CREATIVE
Gamemode: SURVIVAL

# set the bypasspermission that allows users to break blocks even tho they are in the gamemode listed above
BypassPermission: "blockpreventer.bypass"
```



Setup:
1. Download the jar
2. Put it in your /plugins/ folder
3. Start/Restart your server
4. You are done

Todo:
- make it so that you can choose multiple gamemodes
- Suggest me features that I should add at my [Discord](https://discord.gg/32prwHhbWF)

Thanks for downloading

[![NeyHost Discount Code](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/232893185567d89de35dfc44110e6d88ea4dce55_0.webp)](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=DONUT)
